zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de La Hyde於大約1479年出生在英國波克夏丹華斯時，她的父親sir Albert Oliver Hyde19歲，母親Anne Agnes Lovingcote11歲。她和John Yates至少有4個兒子和10個女兒。她去世於1523年5月5日在英國英格蘭波克夏丹華斯享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de La Hyde于大约1479年出生在英国波克夏丹華斯时，她的父亲sir Albert Oliver Hyde19岁，母亲Anne Agnes Lovingcote11岁。她和John Yates至少有4个儿子和10个女儿。她去世于1523年5月5日在英国英格兰波克夏丹華斯享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: La
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Hyde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or other of various places so called in Bedfordshire, Cheshire, Hampshire, and Middlesex. They were named with Old English hīd ‘hide (of land)’, a variable measure of land, differing from place to place and time to time, and seems to have been originally fixed as the amount necessary to support one (extended) family (Old English hīgan, hīwan ‘household’). The surname may also be topographic for someone living on (and farming) a hide of land. The Hyde family has been in Leinster, Ireland, since the early 13th century and one family has been established in the county of Cork since the 16th century. The name was Gaelicized as both Dalaithíd and de hÍde. Compare Hyder .
Americanized form of Jewish   Haid  .

variants.name: Dollarhide
meanings: Irish: possibly an altered form of de la Hyde (see Hyde ), which was a prominent surname in Leinster from medieval times onward. Compare Dollahite .

History: Francis Dollahide, born c. 1650–60 in County Dublin, Ireland, was the ancestor of Americans with the surname Dollahide, Dollahite, and Dollarhide. In 1680 he was transported to MD for some youthful misdemeanor. He appears to have been an educated man and rose to be an important landowner and politician, serving in the Lower House of the MD legislature as an elected representative for Baltimore County from c. 1705 to 1721.

variants.name: Hyder
meanings: English (Kent and Sussex): status name or topographic name for one who lived on or possessed a hide of land, from Middle English hide + the locative suffix -er. This is a characteristically southeastern English name, synonymous with Middle English atte hide elsewhere (see Hyde ).
Americanized form of German   Heider  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

variants.name: Alys
meanings: Variant spelling of   Alice .

variants.name: Alis
meanings: equivalent of Alice .

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de La Hyde was born about 1479, in Denchworth, Berkshire, England, her father, sir Albert Oliver Hyde, was 19 and her mother, Anne Agnes Lovingcote, was 11. She had at least 4 sons and 10 daughters with John Yates. She died on 5 May 1523, in Denchworth, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de La Hyde est née environ 1479, à Denchworth, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, sir Albert Oliver Hyde, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Anne Agnes Lovingcote, avait 11 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 10 filles avec John Yates. Elle est décédée le 5 mai 1523, à Denchworth, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de La Hyde um 1479 in Denchworth, Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater sir Albert Oliver Hyde 19 und ihre Mutter Anne Agnes Lovingcote 11. Sie hatte mit John Yates mindestens 4 Söhne und 10 Töchter. Sie starb am 5. Mai 1523 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Denchworth, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de La Hyde è nata il circa 1479 nel Denchworth, Berkshire, England, sua padre, sir Albert Oliver Hyde, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Anne Agnes Lovingcote, aveva 11 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 10 figlie con John Yates. Morì il 5 maggio 1523, nel Denchworth, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de La Hyde(이)가 대략 1479년 영국 버크실르 덴ch워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 sir Albert Oliver Hyde(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Agnes Lovingcote(은)는 11세였다. 그녀는 John Yates(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 열 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1523년 5월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 덴ch워스에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de La Hyde nasceu aproximadamente 1479, em Denchworth, Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, sir Albert Oliver Hyde, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Anne Agnes Lovingcote, tinha 11 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 10 filhas com John Yates. Ela faleceu em 5 de maio de 1523, em Denchworth, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de La Hyde родилась около 1479 г. в местности денчворт, биркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени sir Albert Oliver Hyde было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Agnes Lovingcote, 11. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 10 дочерей от John Yates. Она умерла 5 мая 1523 г. в местности денчворт, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice de La Hyde nació aproximadamente 1479, en Denchworth, Berkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, sir Albert Oliver Hyde, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Anne Agnes Lovingcote, tenía 11 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 10 hijas con John Yates. Murió el 5 de mayo de 1523, en Denchworth, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 45 años.
